title: plan replayer capture can't record `execute` stmt sometimes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id Int32, name String, age Int32, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE orders(order_id Int32, user_id Int32, amount Decimal(10, 2), PRIMARY KEY(order_id), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 30 AND id IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > 50.00);
key_bug_features: plan replayer capture fails on execute statement
